work.title: AI Researcher
work.description:
● Skilled in foundational machine learning, encompassing both supervised (such as regression and neural networks) and unsupervised techniques.

● Since the release of OpenAI Codex in 2021 ( https://openai.com/index/openai-codex ), I have been conducting AI research in the domain of building compliant mechanisms to address African operational inefficiencies.

● I am working on an open-source leapfrog manual that will be a guideline for leveraging existing systems available in Western regions to solve African operational problems with Artificial Intelligence.
